About us

An online-first tutoring organisation, built for how students actually learn.

South Africa's education system can limit even capable learners — leaving them frustrated and unable to absorb critical knowledge, and their academic journey stagnant. Pedagogy Tutoring Center exists to change that outcome.

We're a team of professionals who are highly qualified in their subject matter, delivering firm, intense and rigorous tutoring on our Learning Management System — with face-to-face sessions available where the learning need calls for it.

We want to revitalise your hopes and dreams. #HopeLivesWithUs

Mission statement

Expert-orientated education, for a remote-first future.

Our aim is to provide expert-orientated education, characterised by firm, intense and rigorous tutoring sessions on our Learning Management System. We believe teaching and learning will increasingly be facilitated remotely — and this project exists to gradually introduce our students to the world of online learning, with confidence and structure.

Programmes

Two learner journeys. One teaching philosophy.

Whether you're a Grade 8–12 learner working through CAPS, or an international student building spoken English, every course runs on the same research-based method.

Children's Oral English

Playful, structured speaking practice for young learners — building pronunciation, confidence and everyday vocabulary through games and guided conversation.

Young learners

Adults' Daily Conversation

Practical, real-world spoken English for adults who need to speak confidently at work, while travelling, or in everyday life.

Conversational fluency

IELTS Speaking Classes

Focused, exam-oriented coaching for international students preparing for the IELTS Speaking module — structured around real test formats and feedback.

Exam preparation
Partner

We work with reputable partner organisations, including Pinxuexue, to bring these speaking programmes to international students who want to learn to speak English with confidence.

Subject-matter expertise is only the entry point — every tutor is trained to deliver our instructional design, not just their subject content.

Our method

Built on instructional design, not improvisation.

We plan every course using the ADDIE model, so knowledge retention and application are engineered into the learning experience — tap a phase to see how it works.

ADDIE · Phase 1 of 5

Analyse

We start by understanding each learner's starting point, gaps and goals — no two study plans begin from the same place.

Connectivism

Learning happens through networks — so students build knowledge through their tutor, peers and digital tools together.

Cognitive Load Theory

Content is sequenced and chunked so working memory isn't overwhelmed, protecting deep understanding over rote recall.

Constructivism

Learners actively construct understanding through guided practice, discussion and application — not passive listening.

Our tools
Google Classroom · LMS Edmodo Moodle Social media e-rater · online assessment
01

Gamification

Points, progress and challenge-based tasks keep learners engaged session after session.

02

Multimedia learning

Video, visuals and interactive material reinforce every concept beyond text alone.

03

Social presence

Learners feel seen and supported, even in a fully remote classroom.

04

Research-based teaching

Every method we use is grounded in established learning science, not trend.

05

Zero-attrition design

Engagement is designed in from the start — our target is that no learner falls away.

06

Online assessment

Tools like e-rater give fast, consistent feedback on written and spoken work.
